headline: What Makes Coca-Cola More Attractive Than PepsiCo?
summary: Coke or Pepsi is an age-old question; here's why many people choose Coca-Cola.

headline: Will PepsiCo (PEP) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: PepsiCo (PEP) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Is Pepsi Football Nation And New Venue Deals Reshaping the Investment Case For PepsiCo (PEP)?
summary: In March 2026, PepsiCo launched Pepsi Football Nation, a global platform unifying its Pepsi MAX football partnerships and fan-focused content across digital, retail, and live experiences, while Venu Holding Corporation announced PepsiCo as the Official Beverage Supplier for its expanding Sunset Amphitheater portfolio across several U.S. cities. These moves highlight PepsiCo’s effort to embed its beverages more deeply into everyday fan culture and live entertainment, potentially strengthening...

headline: We Highlighted 3 Undervalued Dividend Aristocrats a Year Ago: Here’s How They Did and 3 New Picks
summary: A year ago, we identified three Dividend Aristocrats trading at compelling discounts to fair value. That April 1, 2025 article recommended Northwest Natural (NYSE: NWN), Archer Daniels Midland (NYSE: ADM), and PepsiCo (NASDAQ: PEP) as undervalued names worth owning. All three delivered positive returns over the following 12 months, two by wide margins. We are ... We Highlighted 3 Undervalued Dividend Aristocrats a Year Ago: Here’s How They Did and 3 New Picks

headline: Unilever’s Grocery Deal with McCormick Draws Sour Reaction from Investors
summary: Tuesday’s deal would see Unliver “sharpening” into a $45 billion “pure play” in global beauty, wellness, and personal and home care.
